name: Historically Accurate?
description:
How about a historical era lorebook rpg? Like actually accurate and stuff

The following are your options:

I know there are a fuckton of them lmao

Btw i could do multiple in the same bot if its good in demand,like uhh all the roman republic stuff in one bot? All the Samurai Japanese stuff in one bot? Trojan war with all its myths and stuff?

Etc etc

---

Sengoku Jidai – Feudal Japan

16th‐century unification wars

Mongol Invasions of Japan

13th century – attempted conquest by Kublai Khan

Early to High Medieval Europe

Roughly 800–1200, the feudal era

Viking Raids and Settlement of the British Isles

793–1066 AD

Roman Republic ascendant

From 275/270 BC onward

Migration Period and Fall of the Western Roman Empire

4th–5th century AD

Conquests of Alexander the Great

Starting 336 BC

High and Late Middle Ages

Roughly 1080–1530, full scope

Conquest of the British Isles

1258 – internal warfare in Britain

The Crusades – Crusader States and the Holy Land

1174

Northern Crusades in Eastern Europe

1250 – Teutonic Order and Baltic pagans

Early European Exploration and Conquest of the New World

1521 – contact and colonisation in the Americas

18th Century – Age of Enlightenment and Global Empire

Great power struggles, colonial expansion, early industrialisation

Native American Nations in North America

18th century – resistance and survival during colonial expansion

Napoleonic Wars

French Revolutionary Wars through Napoleon’s rise and fall

The Peninsular War

1811–1814 – Iberian theatre against Napoleon

Unification of Japan – Sengoku Jidai

16th century, a return to the warring states

Genpei War

12th century – rise of the samurai class, Minamoto vs. Taira

Boshin War

19th century – clash of traditional samurai culture and modern Western warfare

Peloponnesian War

432 BC – Athens versus Sparta

Rome’s Early Expansion in Italia

399 BC – rise of the Republic

Second Punic War

218 BC – Hannibal’s invasion of Italy

Gallic Wars

58 BC – Julius Caesar’s conquest of Gaul

Second Triumvirate – Octavian vs. Marc Antony

42 BC – Roman civil war after Caesar’s death

Crisis of the Third Century

270 AD – imperial fragmentation and restoration

Late Antiquity – Decline of the Western Roman Empire

Attila the Hun and the barbarian migrations, 4th–5th century

Vandalic War and the Last Roman Reconquest of the West

533 AD – Belisarius’s campaign in North Africa

Age of Charlemagne – Rise of the Carolingian Empire

768 AD – unification of Western Europe

Viking Age Britain

878 AD – Great Heathen Army and the forging of England

Collapse of the Han Dynasty – Three Kingdoms Era

190 AD – warlords divide China

Yellow Turban Rebellion

184 AD – peasant uprising that weakens the Han

Mandate of Heaven – the Road to Dong Zhuo’s Ascension
